holdings.infoBox: XBI is an equity ETF with a total of 153 individual holdings. The top holdings are Travere Therapeutics stock at 2.06%, TG Therapeutics at 2.03%, Twist Bioscience at 1.95%, Revolution Medicines at 1.82%, and Alkermes at 1.81%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Biotech ETF (XBI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Biotechnology Select Industry index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US biotechnology stocks. XBI was launched on Jan 31, 2006 and is issued by State Street.
